calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions Re: 1)Clarification Of Trust Terms, Or In The Altrenative, Modification Of Trust, And 2)Appointnent Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar May-09-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Emilie Calhoun and Elina Protich for Petitioner.

Ms. Protich stated that they are missing two consents, that there are no objections and she is not aware of anyone objecting, and that everyone who has filed something has done so in support of the petition. The Court stated that it is prepared to grant the alternative relief requested for modification of the trust as it appears to be consistent with the Trustor's/Decedent's intent as expressed in the will. The Court granted the Petition for Instructions, etc. (subject to the Court reviewing and modifying the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
